summary: Frontend-only testing of Hönsgården bug fixes and new feature (Rural theme). Tested: Theme selection, Weather icon, Admin panel, AI modal, Community comparison text. All features working as expected.

backend_issues.notes: Backend testing skipped per request - frontend only testing

verified_working.details: 4 theme options visible in Settings: Light, Dark, Rural, System. Rural theme applies warm earthy colors correctly (cream background #F5F0E6, brown text #3D2E1C, leaf icon)
Weather widget at top right shows cloud icon and temperature (5°). Clicking opens weather modal with full content
Admin panel has SafeAreaView. Shows loading spinner with 'Kontrollerar admin-behörighet...' message or 'Ingen åtkomst' for non-admin users - NOT a white screen
AI Daily Report card shows 'Unlock' button. Clicking opens Premium Gate Modal with full content: star icon, 'Upgrade to Premium' title, feature list, pricing options, trial offer
Community comparison section shows 'Top 100%' with label 'of users' (English) / 'av användare' (Swedish) - NOT 'Du slår' / 'You beat'

critical_code_review_comments: Theme button styling: With 4 buttons in flexDirection: 'row', each with flex: 1, on narrow mobile screens the buttons may appear compressed. Consider using flexWrap: 'wrap' for better mobile UX
Language detection: App shows English by default. The isSv check relies on i18n.locale.startsWith('sv'). Ensure language preference is persisted correctly
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested bug fixes verified working. Rural theme, weather modal, admin panel loading states, AI premium gate modal, and community text all display correctly. App defaults to English language in browser testing.

1_rural_theme.requirement: Lantligt tema-val i Inställningar - ska visa 4 tema-val: Ljust, Mörkt, Lantligt, System
1_rural_theme.result: PASS - All 4 theme options visible with correct icons (sun, moon, leaf, phone)

2_weather_icon.requirement: Väderikon på startsidan ska vara klickbar och öppna en vädermodal
2_weather_icon.result: PASS - Weather widget clickable, opens modal with weather details

3_admin_panel.requirement: Admin-panel ska inte vara helt vit - ska visa loading-indikator eller innehåll
3_admin_panel.result: PASS - Shows loading spinner or 'Ingen åtkomst' message, NOT white screen

4_ai_report_modal.requirement: AI-rapport modal ska inte vara tom om användaren är inloggad
4_ai_report_modal.result: PASS - Premium gate modal shows full content with features list and upgrade options

5_community_text.requirement: Community-jämförelse text ska visa 'av användare' istället för 'Du slår'
5_community_text.result: PASS - Shows 'of users' (EN) / 'av användare' (SV) as expected
